name: nuxt-feature-flags-module
description: Lightweight, environment-based feature flag system for Nuxt - made for developers who need dynamic feature control in routes, components, and APIs.

scripts.dev:prepare: nuxt-module-build build --stub && nuxt-module-build prepare && nuxi prepare playground
scripts.release: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test && pnpm run prepack && node .github/scripts/bump-version.mjs && changelogen --output && node .github/scripts/publish.mjs
scripts.refresh: rm -rf pnpm-lock.yaml .nuxt/ dist/ node_modules/ playground/.nuxt/ playground/.output/ playground/node_modules/ && pnpm install && nuxi prepare && pnpm run lint:fix && pnpm run test && pnpm run prepack && pnpm run dev
